It doesn't explain what inputs are required (team IDs in request body), what the operation returns, or the side effects (permission changes, resource availability impact). The improved description provides complete context about inputs, outputs, and state changes necessary for proper operation selection and execution.

data.current_description: Assign a private real device to one or more teams.
data.description_suggestion: Assigns a private real device to one or more teams, enabling those teams to access and use the device for testing. Requires the device_id path parameter and a request body specifying the team IDs to assign. Returns the updated device assignment configuration. This operation modifies device access permissions and may affect team resource availability.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. It doesn't explain what inputs are required (team IDs in request body), what the operation returns, or the side effects (permission changes, resource availability impact). The improved description provides complete context about inputs, outputs, and state changes necessary for proper operation selection and execution.

message: Operation 'updateDeviceSettings' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks specificity about what settings can be modified, what inputs are required, what is returned, and what side effects occur. The improved description clarifies the types of settings that can be updated, specifies the DeviceSettings schema requirement, explains the return value, and notes the immediate effect on test sessions. This enables AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Update configuration settings for a private real device.
data.description_suggestion: Updates configuration settings for a private real device, such as display settings, network configuration, or other device-specific parameters. Requires the device_id path parameter and a DeviceSettings object in the request body specifying which settings to modify. Returns the updated device configuration. Changes take effect immediately and may affect ongoing or future test sessions using this device.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about what settings can be modified, what inputs are required, what is returned, and what side effects occur. The improved description clarifies the types of settings that can be updated, specifies the DeviceSettings schema requirement, explains the return value, and notes the immediate effect on test sessions. This enables AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getJobDetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic. Enhanced summary to be more specific about the action. Expanded description to clarify what 'detailed information' includes and what the response contains, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific job.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a job
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific job including test results, configuration, execution metadata, and status. Returns a Job object containing all job attributes such as name, tags, visibility, pass/fail status, duration, and associated metadata.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Enhanced summary to be more specific about the action. Expanded description to clarify what 'detailed information' includes and what the response contains, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'deleteJob' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description mentions asset deletion but lacks clarity about permanence, response format, and permission requirements. Enhanced description to emphasize irreversibility and clarify response behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Delete a specific job and all its associated assets.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a specific job and all its associated assets (logs, screenshots, video, etc.). This action cannot be undone. Returns a success response upon completion. Requires appropriate permissions to delete the job.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description mentions asset deletion but lacks clarity about permanence, response format, and permission requirements. Enhanced description to emphasize irreversibility and clarify response behavior for better AI agent decision-making.
